narrative:
St Clair Twp township has 5,352 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points.
